title: Formula 1：DQN和DDQN的MSE计算公式
formulas: DQN: a_{t + 1} = \mathop {\arg \max }\limits_{{a_{t + 1}}} Q_{tar}\left( s_{t + 1}, a_{t + 1} \right), MSE = \left| \gamma \left( r_t + Q_{tar}(s_{t+1}, a_{t+1}) \right) - Q_{eval}(s_t, a_t) \right|^2
DDQN: a_{t + 1} = \mathop {\arg \max }\limits_{{a_{t + 1}}} Q_{eval}(s_{t + 1}, a_{t + 1}), MSE = \left| \gamma \left( r_t + Q_{tar}(s_{t+1}, a_{t+1}) \right) - Q_{eval}(s_t, a_t) \right|^2.
